gravel package¶

Submodules¶

gravel.gravel module¶

Main module.

gravel.raster module¶

class gravel.raster.Raster[source]¶

Bases: object

crs¶

Returns raster’s CRS as a pyproj.crs.CRS object

shape¶

Returns raster’s height and width as pixel number

to_numpy()[source]¶

Returns pixel values as 2D numpy ndarray

gravel.vector module¶

class gravel.vector.Vector[source]¶

Bases: object

crs¶

Returns vector’s CRS as a pyproj.crs.CRS object

shape¶

Return a tuple representing the dimensionality of the DataFrame.

to_gdf()[source]¶

Returns vector as a geopandas.GeoDataFrame object

Top-level package for gravel.
